task_completion.description: Verify the 'Asia Pacific' region is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Asia Pacific' in the Regions list or entered in the Region Name field during creation within the ServiceDesk Plus settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the site name 'Singapore Hub' is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Singapore Hub' entered in the 'Site Name' field on the New Site form or visible in the Sites list.

task_completion.description: Verify the site is associated with the 'Asia Pacific' region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Asia Pacific' selected in the 'Region' dropdown menu on the Site configuration form.

task_completion.description: Verify the site address, city, postal code, and country are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '1 Raffles Place' in the Address field, 'Singapore' in the City field, '048616' in the Postal Code/Zip field, and 'Singapore' in the Country field on the Site configuration form.

task_completion.description: Verify the site description is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Regional HQ for APAC operations' in the Description field on the Site configuration form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ServiceDesk Plus web GUI to configure the region and site.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus admin interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be ServiceDesk Plus (ManageEngine), not a text editor, notes app, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries to insert the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of SQL clients, terminal windows running psql/mysql, or scripts being executed to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Region: 'Asia Pacific'. Expected Site: 'Singapore Hub'. Expected Address: '1 Raffles Place'. Expected City: 'Singapore'. Expected Postal Code: '048616'. Expected Country: 'Singapore'. Expected Description: 'Regional HQ for APAC operations'.
